evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); MOS.abrirAnalitica('IDPRO0001147'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,5500)); const sec=document.getElementById('anGrupoSec'); r.header=sec?.querySelector('b')?.textContent; r.chips=[...sec.querySelectorAll('button')].map(b=>b.textContent.trim()).filter(t=>/canónico|Grupo|🥄|Packs/.test(t)); r.formas=[...sec.querySelectorAll('div')].map(d=>d.textContent).filter(t=>/NUEZ PELADA/.test(t)&&t.length<60).slice(0,4); return r; })()
